name: News

personas.name: News Gathering
personas.description: Gather 10 news about Tamil Nadu every one hour.

personas.name: News Publisher
personas.description: Publishes the curated news articles on various platforms and manages the distribution schedule.

actions: Search and gather 10 news articles about Tamil Nadu every hour from reliable news sources.
Aggregate the news articles into a collection.
Immediately publish the gathered news to the News Publisher persona.
flows.sub_goal: Continuously gather fresh, relevant Tamil Nadu news every hour and forward it immediately for publishing.

actions: Format articles for publishing (headlines, summaries, etc.).
Publish the news articles on selected platforms (website, social media, etc.).
Manage the schedule for news distribution.
flows.sub_goal: Verify the authenticity of gathered news and publish it promptly on all selected platforms.

goal: Publish the news about Tamil Nadu
